title: The Lost World : Survivance
description: Welcome to the world full of chaos, survive the fauna taken straight from the past and discover the lost world
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB TO WORK**

(This mod is in the Beta phase, not everything feature in this version will work properly or will exist in the final release)

Beta#1 is only a glimpse of what will be featured in later versions

Discord - https://discord.gg/98vz3fnqrj

Welcome to The Lost World : Survivance

This mod is heavily inspired by The Jurassic Park / World Franchise

This mod adds several new features to your minecraft world like:
- New Mobs:  
  - Tyrannosaurus rex  
  - Spinosaurus  
  - Velociraptor  
  - Aquillops  
  - Asset 87  

(Tyrannosaurus rex, Spinosaurus and Asset 87 have elder version which will spawn near structures)

- New Structures
  - Airport
  - Patrol Boat
  - Helicopter Landing Pad
  - Ranger Station

- New Weapons

- Raptor Claw

- DNA gun

- New Items

- DNA Item of each creature __(It will be useful after Beta Release #2)

Models and Textures made by A0RPG (me)
Structures made by Rekin_Rozbujnik
